projects.title: AutoFACS CV/ML
projects.summary: Hierarchical CV/ML pipeline for facial expression recognition inspired by FACS-based coding. Integrates relevance filtering and calibrated classification with a data-centric focus on training rigor, evaluation, and deployment-ready inference in real-world conditions.

projects.title: AutoFACS CLI Automation
projects.summary: Prompt-governed CLI automation system for AutoFACS, emphasizing bounded execution, audit-first workflows, and human-in-the-loop control. Demonstrates control-plane design principles for reliable, traceable AI/ML operations.

projects.title: LED Pomodoro Timer
projects.summary: A silent custom Arduino Mega Pomodoro timer with 30 high-visibility LEDs, dual focus/break controls, and a custom LightBurn enclosure.

projects.title: Казкар
projects.summary: Arduino-based three-button audio player designed as a screen-free storytelling device for children. Built on Arduino Uno with a custom LightBurn-designed enclosure, emphasizing simplicity, durability, and distraction-free audiobook playback.
